_comment: Personal / local-machine dev overrides. Copy this file to config.local.json (gitignored).
config.local.json is NEVER committed and NEVER included in private builds (BUILD_ENV=private ignores it).
networkAccess — domains that must be allowed in manifest.json for your local dev setup.
These are merged over config.json at build time and written to manifest.json.
Proxy URL and token — configure those once via the plugin Settings UI.
They are stored in Figma clientStorage and persist between sessions.
If you set llm.proxy.baseUrl here it will be baked into your local build bundle,
but it is safer and simpler to use the Settings UI.
2. Edit config.local.json with your actual ngrok URL if it changes.
3. npm run build  (generates manifest.json with your local domains)
4. In Figma: load plugin from manifest.json, open Settings, enter proxy URL + token.
